cases.description: Web container does not exist (missing from docker ps -a)
Web container exists but is stopped (Exited state)
HTTP 500 with TemplateSyntaxError or missing static files
Nginx logs show connection refused to backend
Docker pull failed (only if container is missing)

detect.pull_error: failed to resolve reference|TLS handshake timeout|unauthorized

cases.description: Database connection failure (container is running but DB unreachable)

detect.log_pattern: could not translate host name|Connection refused|timeout
